The attacker successfully logged in using common default credentials (root:root). They executed a single command, `/ip cloud print`, which is specific to MikroTik RouterOS for system information discovery. No further malicious actions, C2, or persistence attempts were observed, indicating a low-sophistication, likely automated reconnaissance attempt targeting MikroTik devices.

The attacker successfully authenticated using common default credentials (T1078.001).
